notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Yandy Díaz reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Ramón Urías.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Chandler Simpson singles on a ground ball to second baseman JJ Wetherholt. Jonathan Aranda scores. Junior Caminero to 3rd. Throwing error by second baseman JJ Wetherholt.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error

notableEvents.label: JJ Wetherholt walk-off
notableEvents.detail: JJ Wetherholt singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jake Fraley. Nathan Church scores. Jordan Walker scores.

notableEvents.label: Yandy Díaz reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Yandy Díaz reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Ramón Urías.

notableEvents.label: Cedric Mullins GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Cedric Mullins grounds into a double play, first baseman Alec Burleson to shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Junior Caminero out at 2nd. Cedric Mullins out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nick Fortes pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nick Fortes grounds out sharply, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Alec Burleson.
